{{nihongo|'''Washitori Shrine'''|和志取神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mikawa Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Washitori Shrine'''|和志取神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mikawa Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Washitori Shrine'''|和志取神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mikawa Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Washitori Shrine'''|和志取神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mikawa Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Washitori Shrine'''|和志取神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mikawa Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Washitori Shrine'''|和志取神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mikawa Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Washitori Shrine'''|和志取神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mikawa Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Washitori Shrine'''|和志取神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mikawa Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Washitori Shrine'''|和志取神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mikawa Province]].
